---
title: "STAT 443 Project - Simple Forecasting Rules"
format: pdf
editor: visual
---

```{r}
library(forecast)
```

```{r}
persist_fc <- function(train, holdout, iprint = FALSE) {
  ntrain <- length(train)
  nh <- length(holdout)
  sse <- 0
  fc_vec <- numeric(nh)
  fc <- train[ntrain]
  yt <- holdout[1]
  fc_vec[1] <- fc
  fcerror <- yt - fc
  sse <- sse + (fcerror^2)
  for (i in 2:nh) {
    yt <- holdout[i]
    fc <- holdout[i-1]
    fc_vec[i] <- fc
    fcerror <- yt - fc
    sse <- sse + (fcerror^2)
  }
  return(list(rmse = sqrt(sse/nh), fc = fc_vec))
}

avg_fc <- function(train, holdout) {
  nh <- length(holdout)
  avg <- mean(train)
  sse <- 0
  fc_vec <- numeric(nh)
  for (i in 1:nh) {
    fc <- avg
    fc_vec[i] <- fc
    yt <- holdout[i]
    fcerror <- yt - fc
    sse <- sse + (fcerror^2)
  }
  return(list(rmse = sqrt(sse/nh), fc = fc_vec))
}

linreg_fc <- function(train_last, holdout, b0, b1) {
  nh <- length(holdout)
  sse <- 0
  fc_vec <- numeric(nh)
  fc <- b0 + b1 * train_last
  yt <- holdout[1]
  fc_vec[1] <- fc
  fcerror <- yt - fc
  sse <- fcerror^2
  for (i in 2:nh) {
    fc <- b0 + b1 * holdout[i - 1]
    fc_vec[i] <- fc
    yt <- holdout[i]
    fcerror <- yt - fc
    sse <- sse + (fcerror^2)
  }
  return(list(rmse = sqrt(sse/nh), fc = fc_vec))
}

plot_forecast <- function(holdout, fc, model_name = "Model") {
  x <- seq_along(holdout)
  plot(x, holdout, type = "l", col = "black", lwd = 2,
       main = paste("Forecast vs Actual -", model_name),
       ylab = "Log Return", xlab = "Time")
  lines(x, fc, col = "red", lwd = 2)
  legend("topleft",
         legend = c("Actual", "Forecast"),
         col = c("black", "red"),
         lty = 1, lwd = 2)
}
```

## Load Data

```{r}
crude_oil <- read.csv("unprocessed data/bloomberg_oil_spot_monthly.tsv",
                       header = TRUE, sep = "\t")
crude_oil$Date <- as.Date(crude_oil$Date)
crude_oil <- crude_oil[order(crude_oil$Date), ]

crude_oil_ts <- ts(
  crude_oil$Last.Price,
  start = c(as.numeric(format(min(crude_oil$Date), "%Y")),
            as.numeric(format(min(crude_oil$Date), "%m"))),
  frequency = 12
)

head(crude_oil_ts)
```

## Split Training - Holdout

```{r}
crude_oil_train_ts <- window(crude_oil_ts, end = c(2015, 12))
crude_oil_holdout_ts <- window(crude_oil_ts, start = c(2016, 1))

dl_crude_oil_train_ts <- diff(log(crude_oil_train_ts))
dl_crude_oil_holdout_ts <- diff(log(crude_oil_holdout_ts))
```

```{r}
plot(dl_crude_oil_train_ts,
     main = "Crude Oil Log Returns (Training Set)", ylab = "Log Return")
```

# Simple Forecasting Rules

## Persistence

```{r}
persist_result <- persist_fc(dl_crude_oil_train_ts, dl_crude_oil_holdout_ts)
persist_result$rmse
```

```{r}
plot_forecast(dl_crude_oil_holdout_ts, persist_result$fc, "Persistence")
```

## Average of Training Set

```{r}
avg_result <- avg_fc(dl_crude_oil_train_ts, dl_crude_oil_holdout_ts)
avg_result$rmse
mean(dl_crude_oil_train_ts)
```

```{r}
plot_forecast(dl_crude_oil_holdout_ts, avg_result$fc, "Average of Training Set")
```

## Linear in Previous Observation

```{r}
n_train <- length(dl_crude_oil_train_ts)
yt <- dl_crude_oil_train_ts[2:n_train]
yt1 <- dl_crude_oil_train_ts[1:(n_train - 1)]
lm_fit <- lm(yt ~ yt1)
print(lm_fit)
```

```{r}
linreg_result <- linreg_fc(
  train_last = dl_crude_oil_train_ts[n_train],
  holdout = dl_crude_oil_holdout_ts,
  b0 = coef(lm_fit)[1],
  b1 = coef(lm_fit)[2]
)
linreg_result$rmse
```

```{r}
plot_forecast(dl_crude_oil_holdout_ts, linreg_result$fc,
              "Linear in Previous Observation")
```

# Summary

```{r}
results <- data.frame(
  Method = c("Persistence", "Average of Training Set",
             "Linear in Previous Observation"),
  RMSE = round(c(persist_result$rmse, avg_result$rmse,
                  linreg_result$rmse), 4)
)
print(results, row.names = FALSE)
```

```{r}
barplot(results$RMSE, names.arg = results$Method,
        main = "Simple Rules - Holdout RMSE",
        ylab = "RMSE (Log Return)", las = 2, cex.names = 0.7,
        col = "steelblue")
```
